privileged_info_summary: The task uses SPY daily OHLCV data from Jan 3, 2023 to Dec 31, 2024 (502 bars). However, the data is NOT real Yahoo Finance data - verified historical prices from web sources show systematic discrepancies: Dec 29, 2023 close is $475.31 in file but actually $463.84 (2.47% error); Dec 31, 2024 close is $586.08 in file but actually $579.27 (1.18% error). These price differences result in incorrect 2024 annual return calculations (23.30% from file vs 24.89% actual). The data appears to be synthetic or modified historical data, not authentic Yahoo Finance prices.
